mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user
(username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user(username, password, nickname, phone, email, status) VALUES(#{user.username}, #{user.password}, #{user.nickname}, #{user.phone}, #{user.email}, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET avatar = #{avatar}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
